CVE-2023-45236.title: EDK2's Network Package is susceptible to a predictable TCP Initia ...
CVE-2023-45236.description:
EDK2's Network Package is susceptible to a predictable TCP Initial Sequence Number. This
 vulnerability can be exploited by an attacker to gain unauthorized 
access and potentially lead to a loss of Confidentiality.

CVE-2023-45237.title: EDK2's Network Package is susceptible to a predictable TCP Initia ...
CVE-2023-45237.description:
EDK2's Network Package is susceptible to a predictable TCP Initial Sequence Number. This
 vulnerability can be exploited by an attacker to gain unauthorized 
access and potentially lead to a loss of Confidentiality.

CVE-2024-1298.title: EDK2 contains a vulnerability when S3 sleep is activated where an ...
CVE-2024-1298.description: EDK2 contains a vulnerability when S3 sleep is activated where an Attacker may cause a Division-By-Zero due to a UNIT32 overflow via local access. A successful exploit of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of Availability.

CVE-2024-13176.title: Issue summary: A timing side-channel which could potentially allo ...
CVE-2024-13176.description:
Issue summary: A timing side-channel which could potentially allow recovering
the private key exists in the ECDSA signature computation.

Impact summary: A timing side-channel in ECDSA signature computations
could allow recovering the private key by an attacker. However, measuring
the timing would require either local access to the signing application or
a very fast network connection with low latency.

There is a timing signal of around 300 nanoseconds when the top word of
the inverted ECDSA nonce value is zero. This can happen with significant
probability only for some of the supported elliptic curves. In particular
the NIST P-521 curve is affected. To be able to measure this leak, the attacker
process must either be located in the same physical computer or must
have a very fast network connection with low latency. For that reason
the severity of this vulnerability is Low.

The FIPS modules in 3.4, 3.3, 3.2, 3.1 and 3.0 are affected by this issue.

CVE-2024-38796.title: EDK2 contains a vulnerability in the PeCoffLoaderRelocateImage(). ...
CVE-2024-38796.description: EDK2 contains a vulnerability in the PeCoffLoaderRelocateImage(). An Attacker may cause memory corruption due to an overflow via an adjacent network. A successful exploit of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of Confidentiality, Integrity, and/or Availability.

CVE-2024-38797.title: EDK2 contains a vulnerability in the HashPeImageByType(). A user  ...
CVE-2024-38797.description: EDK2 contains a vulnerability in the HashPeImageByType(). A user may cause a read out of bounds when a corrupted data pointer and length are sent via an adjecent network. A successful exploit of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of Integrity and/or Availability.

CVE-2024-38798.title: EDK2 contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an attacker may cause ...
CVE-2024-38798.description:
EDK2 contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an attacker may cause “Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor” by local access. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability will lead to 

possible information disclosure or escalation of privilege

 and impact Confidentiality.

CVE-2024-38805.title: EDK2 contains a vulnerability in BIOS where a user may cause an I ...
CVE-2024-38805.description: EDK2 contains a vulnerability in BIOS where a user may cause an Integer Overflow or Wraparound by network means. A successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to denial of service.

CVE-2025-2295.title: EDK2 contains a vulnerability in BIOS where a user may cause an I ...
CVE-2025-2295.description: EDK2 contains a vulnerability in BIOS where a user may cause an Integer Overflow or Wraparound by network means. A successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to denial of service.

CVE-2025-2296.title: EDK2 contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an attacker may cause ...
CVE-2025-2296.description: EDK2 contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an attacker may cause “ Improper Input Validation” by local access. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability could alter control flow in unexpected ways, potentially allowing arbitrary command execution and impacting Confidentiality, Integrity, and Availability.

CVE-2025-3770.title: EDK2 contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an attacker may cause ...
CVE-2025-3770.description: EDK2 contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an attacker may cause “Protection Mechanism Failure” by local access. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability will lead to arbitrary code execution and impact Confidentiality, Integrity, and Availability.
